About the clinic

A modern home for healthier, happier smiles.

Faeldin Dental Clinic was founded on a simple belief: world-class dental care should feel warm, unhurried, and genuinely personal. We pair the latest techniques with a thoughtful, comfort-first approach so every visit leaves you reassured — not anxious.

Our mission

Deliver safe, ethical, and lasting dental care for every Filipino family.

Our vision

To be Manila's most trusted name in gentle, modern, and aesthetic dentistry.

Comfort first

A spa-like space designed to keep you calm from check-in to check-out.

Honest pricing

Clear treatment plans and transparent costs — no surprises, ever.

Meet your dentist

Expert hands you can trust.

Led by a dedicated clinician whose work spans orthodontics, oral surgery, and smile aesthetics.

TF
Add Dra. Faeldin's photo here
Clinic Director

Dra. Tam Cortez-Faeldin

Orthodontics · Surgery & Aesthetics

Dra. Faeldin combines clinical precision with an artist's eye for natural-looking results. Whether straightening a teenager's bite or designing an adult's dream smile, she's known for patient, judgment-free care and treatment plans tailored to each person's goals and budget.

OrthodonticsOral SurgerySmile AestheticsCosmetic DentistryImplants
Doctor of Dental Medicine (DMD), licensed by the PRC
Post-graduate training in Orthodontics & Surgery
Member, Philippine Dental Association (PDA)

Technology & facilities

Advanced care, calming comfort.

We've invested in modern equipment and strict hygiene standards so your treatment is faster, safer, and more comfortable.

Digital X-Rays

Up to 90% less radiation with instant, high-resolution imaging.

Intraoral Scanners

Comfortable digital impressions — no messy molds or gagging.

Hospital-Grade Sterilization

Autoclaved instruments and single-use supplies for every patient.

Comfort-Focused Suites

A warm, spa-like environment designed to ease dental anxiety.

For dental emergencies during clinic hours, call us directly and we'll do our best to see you the same day.

Insurance & payment

Flexible ways to pay.

Quality dental care should be accessible. We accept a range of payment options and major HMOs.

Cash & Cards

Cash, Visa, Mastercard, and major debit cards accepted at the clinic.

GCash & E-Wallets

Fast, contactless payments via GCash and other supported wallets.

Bank Transfer

Pay securely through InstaPay / PESONet to our partner banks.

HMO & Insurance

We coordinate with major HMO providers — ask us about your coverage.

Installment Plans

Staggered payment options available for braces and major treatments.

Transparent Quotes

You'll always get a clear, written estimate before any treatment begins.

Good to know

Frequently asked questions.

We strongly recommend booking ahead so we can reserve enough time for your care. Walk-ins are welcome when slots are available, and we always try to accommodate dental emergencies on the same day.

Costs vary by procedure and complexity. After your consultation you'll receive a clear, written estimate before anything begins — with no hidden fees. We also offer installment options for braces and major treatments.

Comfort is our priority. We use effective local anaesthesia and gentle techniques, so most patients feel little to no pain. Mild soreness after some procedures is normal and easily managed — we'll guide you through aftercare.

Most orthodontic treatments run between 12 and 24 months depending on your case. During your assessment, Dra. Faeldin will give you a realistic timeline and explain each stage of the journey.

Absolutely. We offer pediatric dentistry in a friendly, patient environment that helps kids feel safe and build healthy habits early. First visits are gentle and unhurried.

Call us right away at 0916 791 3000. For severe pain, swelling, or a knocked-out tooth, contact us as soon as possible during clinic hours and we'll prioritise getting you seen.
